description:
Recto: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Apparently granting property rights, mentioning a deceased father; Abū l-Mufaḍḍal Netanʾel; [...] b. Avraham ha-Bavli; and Fusṭāṭ. (Information in part from CUDL)

Verso: Very faded Arabic document on verso, with wide line spacing, typical of state documents, but not typical of Arabic documents on parchment.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
